titleStmt.title: SII 38.133: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 133. (A.R. No. 133 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base, central shrine, of the same temple.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tirumaṉni viḷaṅgu.

Records that an official Aridāyamaṅgalam-uḍaiyār Ādittaṉ Taṟparamporuḷār alias Madhurāntaka Mūvēndavēḷār of Aridāyamaṅgalam in Muḍichō-nāḍu in Kalyāṇapuraṅkoṇḍasōḻa-vaḷanāḍu deposited 40 aṉṟāḍu naṟkāśu at the temple treasury in order to provide food offerings (mantra-pōṉagam) to Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyār during the mid-day and also to feed a brāhmaṇa, well versed in Vēdas and a mendicant before offering food to god (agaramuṇpadaṟku).

The ūrār of Eṇṇūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachoḻa-maṇḍalam who received the amount from the temple, sold 2(1/2) vēli one and half kāṇi for cultivation and 50 kuḻi for residential purposes for the cultivators of the temple land. The above amount taken by the ūrār of Eṇṇūr constituted the price-money and the capital for paying the taxes on that land. The ūrār agreed not to collect taxes such as pūppoṉ, pañchavāram, nīrvilai etc, but themselves agreed to remit them.

It was also decided to induct Amidaraṅ-kiḻavaṉ Ūnamili and his descendants as cultivating tenants. They were to cultivate the land and measure out 75 kalam of paddy at the rate of 35 kalam, 1 tūṇi and 1 padakku per vēli for the stated purposes.
Vaṇakkaṉ Sōmaḍi Tiruvēḷi and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉniviḷaṅku miruku vaṭaṉaiya taṉ toḷum vāḷum tuṇaiyeṉak karuti keḻalā vañcaṉai kaṭantu vayirākarattuk kuñcarak kuḻām pala vāri Añcalin cakkarakoṭṭattārāvaraicaṉait tikku nikaḻt tiṟaikoṇṭaruḷi Arukkaṉutaiyat tācaiyilirukkum kamalamaṉaiya nilamakaḷ taṉṉai muṉnir kuḷittavaṉ nāṉ tirumālākik keḻalāki Eṭuttaṉṉatuñ caliyāvatai yini neṭuttut taṉ kuṭai niḻaliṉpuṟa viruttina kikiriyumRead kirttiyum puliyum ticai toṟum naṭāttip pukaḻ viramum puvitoṟum niṟutti viramum(ṉ)tiyākamum māṉamuṅ karu
ṇaiyum Urimaic cuṟṟamāka perukiya tala nikaḻa jayamun tāṉum viṟṟirun=ta kulamaṇi makuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉ kaḻalaṭi tarātivar cūṭac ceṅkol nāvalam puvitoṟum naṭāttiya korājakesaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājendracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻal koṭṭattu puḻalnāṭṭu Eṇṇūr Ūrom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu kaliyāṇapuraṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu muṭiccoṇāṭṭu Aritāyamaṅkalamuṭaiyār Ātittaṉ taṟparamporuḷārāṉa
Atikārikaḷ maturān=takamuven=taveḷār Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyārkku mattiyānattu man=tiraponakam Amutu ceytaruḷukaikku vetamvallāṉ Orubrāhmaṇaṉ tāṉ civacoki tāṉ AṟagramRead agram Uṇpataṟkku veṇṭum nivan=tattu Ittevar paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa Aṉṟāṭunāṟkācu nāṟpatu Ikkācu nāṟpatum Ikkoyilil Ātidāsacaṇṭeśvaradevar pakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu nāṟkācu nāṟpatu Ikkācu nāṟpatum koṇṭu nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai Eṅkaḷur teṉ
kiḻaṉiRead kaḻaṉikku nirpāyn=ta Āṟṟu vāykkālil mel karaikkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kaliyaṉ matiyaṉ kaṇṇāṟṟu vaṭavarampukkum melpāṟkellai vallūr Ellai varampukkum cempiyaṉciṟukūḻur Ellai varampukkum vaṭapāṟkellai paṭṭaṉ maṭaikku teṟkil kuṇṭilil vaṭavarampukku teṟkum Iṉnāṅkellaikkuḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilam patiṉaṟu cāṇkolāl kuḻi nālāyirattu muppattaiñcaraiye mākāṇiyā(l)le Iraṇṭekāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Iṉṉāṅkellai Uṭpaṭa nilattil kālum karampu varampum
Uḷpaṭa Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiyum Iṉnilam Uḻukuṭi Irukka karuṇākaraṉceriyil Avaṉ Akattukku teṟkkaṭaiya Ikkolāl kuḻi Aimpatum Iṉnilattukku Emmil Icain=ta vilaipporuḷum Iṟaipporuḷum Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉnilattāl van=ta pūppoṉṉum pañcavāramum nirvilaiyum veṭṭimuṭṭaiyāḷ Eccoṟṟuk kūṟṟunel Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimaikaḷum velikkācu Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimaikaḷum velikkācu Uḷḷiṭṭa An=tarāyaṅkaḷum Iṉnilattāl van=ta Iṟai Eṅkaḷur meleṟṟi nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum Iṉnila
ttukku vilaipporuḷum Iṟaipporuḷum Aṟakkoṇṭu Ikkoyil Ātitāsacaṇṭeśvaradevarkku Oru kālāvatum Iru(k)kālāvatum mukkālāvatum Emmil Icain=ta vilaipporuḷum Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉnilattukku nirpāyn=ta Āṟṟukālum Aṭaittu nirpāccik koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Ivvāykkā(l)lum maṟṟum Iṉnilattu nirkkiyan=ta vaṇṇam kuṟṟettamum kūṭaiyum Iṟaittu koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Ipparicu Icaintu vilaipporuḷ Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Eṇṇūrūrom nāṅka
ḷ kuṭutta nilam Attaṉaiyum Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam Ikaṇaiyūril Amitāṅ kiḻavaṉ niṉañciraṉ Ūṉamiliyum Ivaṉ vaṟkkattārumey kāṇiyākak kaiykkoṇṭu payireṟṟi veli Oṉṟukku nellu muppattaiyṅ kalane tūṇippatakkāka veli Iraṇṭaraiye kāṇi Araikkāṇikkum Aḷakka kaṭava nellu Eḻupattaiyṅ kalamum muṭṭāme nittal nivan=tañ celuttak kaṭavatākavum Iṉ nellu Eḻupattaiy kalamuṅkoṇṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyārkku mattiyānattu man=tiraponakam Amutu ceyturuḷukai
kkum vetam Otuvāṉ Oru brāhmaṇaṉnātal civacokiyātal Agram Uṇṇakkaṭavanākavum patteṭṭuk kuttal paḻavarici nāṉāḻikku nellu kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu nālukku nellu Irunāḻiyum neyyamutu kkiṉukku nellu nāṉāḻiyum tayir muṉnāḻikku nellu Iru nāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutukku veṟuṅkāy Eṭṭukkum Ilai Amutu Irupatukkum nellu Iru nāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu patakku nāṉāḻiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟṟupatukku nellu Eḻupattaiñcu kalamum celuttakkaṭavatāka Ippaṭi
can=tirātittavaṟ niman=tañ celutta kalveṭṭumpaṭi Eḻutik kuṭuttom Eṇṇūr Ūrom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr vaiykācanaṉRead vaikānacaṉ pārattuvāji veṅkaṭavāṇaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Icaintu viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ vaṇṇakkaṉ comaṭitiruveḷi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Icaintu viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ Attuḷāṉ kūttaṉcāṇaneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu Ippaṭi Icaintu viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ vaṇṇakkaṉ comaṭi viṭaṅkaneṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ vaṇ
ṇakkaṉ Ampalattāṭi kuñciramallaṉ Āṉa Uyyakkoṇṭa coḻa muven=taveḷāneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Eṇṇūr maṅkalāccaṉ tevaṉ poṉṉaneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ valapo nikaincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
